mapper.sql: SELECT ms.id, ms.asset_id, ai.asset_code, ai.asset_name, ms.server_ip, ms.hostname, ms.os_name, ms.cpu_cores, ms.memory_gb, ms.disk_gb, ms.monitor_status, ms.last_collect_time, ms.connection_status, ms.ssh_port, ms.ssh_username, ms.agent_path, ms.agent_enabled, ms.del_flag, ms.remark, ms.create_by, ms.create_time, ms.update_by, ms.update_time FROM monitor_server ms LEFT JOIN asset_info ai ON ai.id = ms.asset_id AND ai.del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: SELECT ms.id, ms.asset_id, ai.asset_code, ai.asset_name, ms.server_ip, ms.hostname, ms.os_name, ms.cpu_cores, ms.memory_gb, ms.disk_gb, ms.monitor_status, ms.last_collect_time, ms.connection_status, ms.ssh_port, ms.ssh_username, ms.agent_path, ms.agent_token, ms.agent_enabled, ms.del_flag, ms.remark, ms.create_by, ms.create_time, ms.update_by, ms.update_time FROM monitor_server ms LEFT JOIN asset_info ai ON ai.id = ms.asset_id AND ai.del_flag = '0' WHERE ms.id = #{id} AND ms.del_flag = '0'
WHERE ms.del_flag = '0' AND ms.connection_status = '0' ORDER BY ms.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO monitor_server( asset_id, server_ip, hostname, os_name, cpu_cores, memory_gb, disk_gb, monitor_status, connection_status, ssh_port, ssh_username, agent_path, agent_enabled, remark, create_by, create_time ) VALUES ( #{assetId}, #{serverIp}, #{hostname}, #{osName}, #{cpuCores}, #{memoryGb}, #{diskGb}, #{monitorStatus}, #{connectionStatus}, #{sshPort}, #{sshUsername}, #{agentPath}, #{agentEnabled}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE monitor_server SET last_collect_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{serverId}
UPDATE monitor_server SET last_collect_time = #{lastCollectTime}, monitor_status = #{monitorStatus}, connection_status = #{connectionStatus}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{serverId}
UPDATE monitor_server SET agent_token = #{agentToken}, agent_enabled = #{agentEnabled}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.delete: UPDATE monitor_server SET del_flag = '1' WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE monitor_server SET del_flag = '1' WHERE id IN
#{id}
